form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 2nd in a small field at this track on March 27 over 905m, 0.1 len behind Theycallhimgoldie carrying 55.5kg at $1.70. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start in a small field at this track on March 28 over 905m, 2.75 len behind Bold Boomer carrying 54.5kg at $1.80. The run before that 4th of 10 at this track on February 19 over 1308m, 6 len behind Not My Circus with 55.5kg at $4.80. Not far from winner at his last appearance and rates highly.

formComments.title: TAB

The run before that 4th of 10 at this track on February 19 over 1308m, 6 len behind Not My Circus with 55.5kg at $4.80. Not far from winner at his last appearance and rates highly.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at this track on March 19 over 1408m, 4.5 len behind My Brothers Angel carrying 53kg at $4.60. The run before that 4th in a small field at this track on March 5 over 905m, 6 len behind Fiber Rocks carrying 53kg at $3.10. Well placed. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when eased back early on 5th of 7 at Mountaineer Park on December 1 over 1106m, 15 len behind A Ok with 54.5kg at $28. Hard to have.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 2nd of 7 at this track on February 28 over 1408m, 6 len behind Buster The Bully carrying 55.5kg at $8.
